prerequisites.label: GoHighLevel Private Integration Token (PIT)
prerequisites.satisfy: Add GOHIGHLEVEL_API_KEY=<your PIT> to ~/.openclaw/secrets/.env (chmod 600), then run: openclaw config set env.vars.GOHIGHLEVEL_API_KEY "$GOHIGHLEVEL_API_KEY". Get the PIT from GHL Settings > Integrations > Private Integrations. On a VPS/Docker box, run the config set inside the container as user node (docker exec -u node ...) since root config writes can freeze the gateway, and use /data/.openclaw/secrets/.env.

prerequisites.label: GoHighLevel Location ID
prerequisites.satisfy: Add GOHIGHLEVEL_LOCATION_ID=<your location id> to ~/.openclaw/secrets/.env, then: openclaw config set env.vars.GOHIGHLEVEL_LOCATION_ID "$GOHIGHLEVEL_LOCATION_ID". On a VPS/Docker box, run the config set inside the container as user node (docker exec -u node ...) and use /data/.openclaw/secrets/.env.

prerequisites.label: Skill 01 - Teach Yourself Protocol (TYP)
prerequisites.satisfy: Install Skill 01 (01-teach-yourself-protocol) into ~/.openclaw/skills (/data/.openclaw/skills on a VPS/Docker box). SKILL.md declares it mandatory under 'You MUST have these installed first: 1. Teach Yourself Protocol (TYP) - Skill 01'. It is in the same onboarding package; re-run the installer or install Skill 01 on its own.

prerequisites.label: Skill 02 - Back Yourself Up Protocol
prerequisites.satisfy: Install Skill 02 (02-back-yourself-up-protocol) into ~/.openclaw/skills (/data/.openclaw/skills on a VPS/Docker box). SKILL.md declares it mandatory under 'You MUST have these installed first: 2. Back Yourself Up Protocol - Skill 02'. It is in the same onboarding package; re-run the installer or install Skill 02 on its own.
